items.raw_desc: Társas Jungo:                Combine and discard cards firstJungo is a card game that's perfect for a quick game with family or friends. Your task will be to get rid of all the cards from your hand. Players are dealt a certain number of cards at the start, but the important rule is that they must not rearrange them in any way. The cards have a number from 1 to 8 or a pair of numbers on them. The player on the turn can play a card or set of cards to beat the one currently on the table. He can take the earned stitch or throw it away. If the player cannot or will not fold, he draws a card from the deck. The first to get rid of the cards wins. Jungo delights with its interesting design and is suitable for up to 5 players aged 10 and up. items.raw_desc: Pótalkatrész OMRON Gyógyszertartály:If you like to treat common colds and various respiratory diseases by effectively applying medication in the form of an inhalation aerosol directly into the lungs using the Celimed U-615 ultrasonic inhaler (Joycare JC-615 / NB152U), you will appreciate the OMRON set of 5 replacement medication canisters. The medication container serves as a reservoir for the medication and a source of inhaled aerosol. It allows you to accurately measure the amount of medicine you consume during inhalation.
